title: DAO Mergers
html: Stub. Yahir's late-2022 speculation in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream: "DAO mergers being a way to monopolize legally???" and "being a third party responsible for administration of DAOs?? Eliminating insider BS within the org." Crypto-era idea cluster. Prefigures the operator-of-orgs instinct behind rankett.
